title: nvm_list: no termination guard — infinite loop on stuck server cursor
description: nvm_list advances by passing start_id=last_seen_out_id. If the server returns the same out_id as start_id on successive calls (server cursor bug), the loop repeats forever. Fix: detect out_id == start_id (for non-zero cursor) as a stuck-cursor condition and return ProtocolError, or add a u16::MAX iteration cap.
